engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Two mounting bosses with widths 13±0.3mm (top) and 15±0.2mm (bottom), both with bilateral tolerances. Two C0.3mm chamfers specified.

unresolved_items.details: 4.7(MAX) visible in context image at expected position but only partial OCR coverage. Included in output as T004 with medium confidence and empty source_ids.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Three-step cylindrical housing with diameters Φ85 ±0.043 mm (outer), Φ61.6 +0.15/0 mm (middle), and Φ52 +0.046/0 mm (inner). Positional tolerance of ⌀0.08 relative to datum A controls feature alignment.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Motor housing outer diameter Φ85 ±0.043 mm with stepped internal diameters for component mounting
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: 3-phase power line and thermistor wire exit at position H with 300 ±10 mm cable length. Root heat shrink tubing provides strain relief and environmental protection at cable exit.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: OCR source_id for L character near position tolerance is uncertain (ocr_008 confidence 0.97). Complete geometric tolerance frame construction requires additional feature identification. Datum feature definition for A is not visible in this view.

unresolved_items.item_description: OCR detected 'L' character near tolerance callout but unclear engineering meaning
unresolved_items.reason: Low context clarity - may be dimension reference, leader line artifact, or datum marker
unresolved_items.suggested_resolution: Review full drawing sheet for dimension reference system

unresolved_items.item_description: OCR detected '2C' at inner diameter region with low confidence
unresolved_items.reason: Confidence 0.735, unclear if this is dimension notation, view marker, or OCR noise
unresolved_items.suggested_resolution: Verify against original PDF at higher resolution

unresolved_items.reason: OCR engine merged multiple separate callouts into single detection regions - these were separated into individual dimensions T006 and T007
unresolved_items.suggested_resolution: Individual dimensions correctly extracted from composite detections

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 该裁剪区域是电机性能参数表，包含额定功率、额定/最大转速、转矩、电流、线电阻、线电感、反电动势常数等电机规格；结合完整源图可知它位于产品外形图中的参数说明区，不属于针脚定义或性能曲线，因此归入最接近的机械尺寸类。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。必须体现针脚功能、线序、线色、接线关系或接口定义；仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向或连接器安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为'线束定义表Wire Signal Definition'，列出'U'、'V'、'W'三相动力线及'NTC'的引线颜色'红 RD'、'黄 YE'、'蓝 BU'、'白 WH'和线径'18AWG'、'26AWG'，体现动力线束接线定义。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
